---
title: "Exercise 1"
author: '43182'
date: "2024-10-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# This chunk transform the iris data to include a column on petal area

transform_iris <- function(data){
  data$Petal.Area <- data$Petal.Length * data$Petal.Width
  return(data)
}

iris_new <- transform_iris(iris)

head(iris_new)
```

```{r}
# This chunk transform the iris data to include a column on sepal area

transform_iris_sepal <- function(data){
  data$Sepal.Area <- data$Sepal.Length * data$Sepal.Width
  return(data)
}

iris_with_sepal <- transform_iris_sepal(iris)

head(iris_with_sepal)
```
